items.description: AI training startup Shift wants to clean your home for free. items.title: Hundreds of prolific Wikipedia editors are threatening to go on strike
items.description: Wikipedia is one of the last bastions of trust on the internet. But last week, volunteer editors and contributors were alarmed to hear that a small but important team of engineers at the nonprofit that supports it had been laid off.
